scope: real Hermes runtime, systemd-managed gateway service, controlled process recovery, post-recovery Hermes and Kanban health checks

summary.recovery_method: controlled gateway process termination followed by systemd Restart=always recovery
summary.direct_restart_attempt: systemctl restart returned non-zero from the operator shell while the gateway remained healthy

cleanup.method: gateway recovered under systemd supervision; no board, task, workspace, raw log or runtime id was retained in the public repo

limits: This proves the real Hermes gateway recovery and monitoring health-check path for the current production preflight.
It does not prove a code-version rollback, package rollback, Discord gateway recovery, cloud rollback, external monitoring stack or complete update receipt.
The unprivileged direct systemctl restart path returned non-zero; the proven path is controlled process termination plus systemd Restart=always recovery.
Raw runtime output, local paths, process ids, service logs and private runtime identifiers are intentionally not stored in the public repository.
